description: Поглощение новых данных в wiki — единственный путь: capture → integrate

evaluation.message: Источник в protected zone. Используй capture flow.

steps.name: external_source_policy
steps.description: Canonical external source rules (EXT-RES1) with ingest-specific hooks for manifest creation and registry updates.

rules.core_rule: External links → canonical http/https URLs. Never raw/** or ../**.

exceptions.reason: raw/** in prose = documentation, not link

rules.rule: Use most specific URL matching content granularity. Repo root = only if covering entire project.

ingest_flow.action: extract canonical URL → replace raw/ link

rules.exception_local_only: Link to raw/ required when no external URL exists

steps.name: create_corrected_copy_or_skip
steps.description: После capture (original saved to raw/SRC-*/) — агент проверяет, есть ли уже corrected copy в raw/corrected/. Если нет → создаёт её через scripts/raw-correct.sh.

pre_condition.purpose: create corrected copy after capturing original

actions.description: Проверить, существует ли уже исправленная копия
Создать corrected copy с исправленными ссылками, опечатками

actions.note: Уже есть processed версия → перейти к шагу 1 (source analysis)

source_layer_classification.description: Classify each source for Reality Layer cascade priority
source_layer_classification.agent_prompt:
Determine source_layer based on file content:
- If it contains code, GitHub issue/PR → code_reality
- If it contains live metrics/API responses/logs → live_state
- Otherwise (docs/articles/blogs) → documentation
This determines contradiction cascade priority.

actions.description: Оценивает каждый факт по уровню доказательности для documentation sources
actions.agent_prompt: Analyze each claim in the source. Classify as documented/corroborated/assertion_only. Only apply for documentation type sources.

actions.description: Автоматически преобразует все относительные markdown-ссылки в raw-источнике на GitHub permalinks.

rules.action: auto_convert: replace all relative .md links with GitHub permalink
auto_convert: preserve subdirectory structure in permalink

steps.name: batch_ingest_trigger
steps.description: Если агент получает/обнаруживает N+ связанных источников → запускает batch-ingest.sh для кластеризации перед discussion.

actions.description: Скрипт сканирует все файлы, извлекает H1/tags/keywords, группирует по shared entities

actions.format: JSON {clusters: [{id, name, sources: [], shared_keywords}], total_sources: N}

actions.description: Агент показывает кластеризованные результаты для принятия решения о batch processing

evaluation.note: no_batch_needed — proceed to step_2 (discussion) with individual sources

syntheses_rule.rule: DR-4: syntheses treated as special category. Only create new synthesis if agent detects **new logical inference** (not just fact collection). Requires explicit fixation flag from user.
syntheses_rule.action_if_no_novel_inference: SKIP_SAVE → suggest adding to existing concept/entity page instead

post_operations.note: Full walk link validation via unified-pass (shared walk). Replaces separate link-validator.sh call. Output is JSON to stdout.
Multi-level crosslink discovery: H1 title (+3) → shared sources (+5) → frontmatter related (+4). Results sorted by score.

post_operations.description: Parse auto-crosslink JSON output, add backlinks to pages with score >= 5. Low scores (3-4) are informational only — suggest manual review.
post_operations.action_if_high_score_found: Add [[path]] to related/mentions section in high-score page if not already present

post_operations.note: Full walk link validation via unified-pass (shared walk). Replaces separate link-validator.sh call. Output is JSON to stdout.
Multi-level crosslink discovery: H1 title (+3) → shared sources (+5) → frontmatter related (+4). Results sorted by score.

post_operations.description: Parse auto-crosslink JSON output, add backlinks to pages with score >= 5. Low scores (3-4) are informational only — suggest manual review.
post_operations.action_if_high_score_found: Add [[path]] to related/mentions section in high-score page if not already present

steps.name: post_integration_overlap_scan
steps.description: Сканит wiki на overlap с новой/обновлённой страницей. Применяет DR-1/DR-2 из decision-rules.md.

actions.description: Из JSON output извлечь matches[] → для каждого pair: similarity_score, file1, file2

evaluation.note: Agent review required — apply DR-1/DR-2 из decision-rules.md к каждому overlap. Read existing pages from matches[].file1, compare with new page, proceed to cross_link_update after evaluation.

actions.description: Multi-level crosslink discovery: H1 title (+3) → shared sources (+5) → frontmatter related (+4). Sorted by score descending.
Only add backlinks for pages with score >= 5 (significant match). Lower scores are informational only.

actions.format: Add [[wiki-relative-path]] to related/mentions section if not already present

actions.rule: syntheses treated as special category per DR-4. Auto-crosslink distinguishes synthesis from entity/concept via scoring. Never auto-create synthesis without explicit fixation flag.

actions.note: Low score matches (3-4) may be weak connections — suggest manual review rather than auto-add

steps.name: register_source_ingested
steps.description: После успешного создания/обновления страницы — добавь ID raw-пакета в tracking/raw_registry.json, исключив его из будущих проверок новых источников. Сбрось new_sources_pending marker.

steps.name: auto_update_index
steps.note: Полностью заменяет ручной update_index. Автоматически перестраивает index.md из всех wiki-страниц по категориям (entities→concepts→comparisons→syntheses→...).

steps.name: post_operation_link_validation
steps.description: После создания/обновления wiki-страницы — проверить только новые файлы, НЕ сканировать весь wiki. Легковесная проверка.

actions.description: Full walk link validation via unified-pass (shared walk). Replaces separate link-validator.sh call.

actions.note: Can resolve autonomously: rewrite to correct path

actions.fallback_message: [!] Broken link detected in new page. Cannot auto-fix.

note: Guardrails are defined in AGENTS.md. This file references them rather than duplicating.

strict_rules.capture_first_integrate_second: Сначала сохрани оригинал в raw/, затем создай/обнови wiki-страницу.

batch_mode.note: Этот режим экономит время, но требует доверия к автономным решениям агента.

error_handling.description: При обнаружении любой ошибки, противоречия или dead end — не зависать. Следовать 4-step loop.

resolution_strategies.description: Отметить как CONFLICT на странице и продолжить

schema_evolution.description: Template Co-evolution Process — агент предлагает улучшения через [schema-patch] в log.md. User должен approve → agent commit update.

logging_actions.trigger: when agent detects structural improvement opportunity for wiki pages

schema_evolution.rule: Never auto-modify templates — always user-approved changes per AGENTS.md#template_co_evolution
